title: Generating novel scientific hypotheses with Co-Scientist
summary: Co-Scientist is a Gemini-based multi-agent AI system developed by Google DeepMind that iteratively generates, debates, and refines novel hypotheses for complex scientific problems. The system is designed to accelerate scientific discovery by helping researchers connect disparate facts and formulate testable hypotheses.
